title: bromus cylindraceus
intro: Bromus cylindraceus, also known as bluebunch wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The health benefits of bluebunch wheatgrass include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of bluebunch wheatgrass may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
